summary: Built RAG Document Training system for Agency SOPs. Enhanced RAG pipeline with SOP-specific processing (step extraction, category detection, priority ranking). Added Knowledge Base Browser UI tab with document status, chunk preview, re-process, and delete capabilities. Wired SOP knowledge retrieval into agent orchestrator for training data reference during task execution.

deliverables.sopProcessing: server/services/rag.service.ts - processSOPContent() extracts steps, detects category (sop/process/policy/reference/training), assigns priority 1-10, extracts tags
deliverables.priorityRetrieval: server/services/rag.service.ts - retrieve() now uses priority-weighted scoring so SOP/process docs rank higher
deliverables.reprocessEndpoint: server/api/routers/rag.ts - reprocessSource mutation re-runs SOP processing on existing documents
deliverables.knowledgeSummary: server/api/routers/rag.ts - knowledgeSummary query returns categorized counts and SOP step data
deliverables.knowledgeBrowser: client/src/components/training/KnowledgeBaseBrowser.tsx - Full KB browser with status, categories, chunk preview, search, filter
deliverables.orchestratorIntegration: server/services/agentOrchestrator.service.ts - Enhanced RAG context fetch with SOP-specific retrieval and priority filtering
deliverables.promptEnhancement: server/services/agentPrompts.ts - RAGContext extended with sopDocuments field, buildRAGContextPrompt includes SOP content
